creator: execve@gmail.com
text:
I started to check on this old bug and this has been fixed sometime since the bug was reported. 

In https://www.freebsd.org/ports/emulators.html , 
version mentioned is hercules-3.13. Also the main web site correctly points to http://www.hercules-390.eu/

This bug could be marked as fixed - but not where where along the way this happened.
